narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township B (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,201 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.4 percentage points.
